context: The response should exercise the `learn` Context Specs skill using repo-specific harness behavior.

checklist.name: reads_merged_diff
checklist.description: Starts from the merged diff and relevant PR/spec context.

checklist.name: routes_learning
checklist.description: Routes durable facts to the right destination: Expert shards, AGENTS.md pointers, candidate lints/checks, or invariants.

checklist.name: avoids_private_noise
checklist.description: Avoids persisting transient logs or one-off runtime details as durable memory.

checklist.name: opens_reviewable_pr
checklist.description: Writes updates on a reviewable learn branch/PR rather than silently mutating main.

checklist.name: handles_stale_memory
checklist.description: Considers removing or updating stale memory made obsolete by the merge.
